findings.evidence: In the PDF, there are handwritten initials/signatures next to the names in the 'FROM:' field (Karen Higgins and Brian Wrenn). These are absent in the HTML version.
The PDF contains a 'One North Carolina Naturally' logo in the bottom right corner of the page. This image is not present in the HTML rendering.
The contact information block in the bottom left of the PDF is rendered with right-alignment in the HTML version instead of left-alignment.
The list item continuing from the previous page begins with the marker 'i.' in the PDF. In the HTML, this has been incorrectly converted to 'ix.'.
